business_ideas.idea: Revenue-share model for multi-channel expansion: help single-channel businesses launch on new platforms without upfront cost
Amazon FBA expansion service: list Shopify stores on Amazon using affiliate model with guaranteed revenue uplift
Live chat service for Google My Business: provide after-hours lead capture and sales for 20% commission
TikTok Shop affiliate content creation: use AI voices and images daily to promote trending products for commissions
SaaS affiliate content: create free funnels for niche audiences (e.g. chiropractors) to get HubSpot signups at high commissions

predictions.text: CPM costs on Facebook and Google will continue rising, creating persistent arbitrage opportunities for lower-CAC customer acquisition
TikTok Shop and social commerce will remain the highest-ROI channel for affiliate and D2C creators in 2024-2025
